sentences: I like to eat a juicy apple for a snack.
The apple is red and delicious.
translations: 我喜欢的零食是美味多汁的苹果。

sentences: Let's play ball together in the park.
The ball is round, and we can kick it.
translations: 我们一起去公园里玩球吧。
这球是圆的 ，我们可以踢它。

sentences: My friend has a cute cat as a pet.
The cat says "meow" and has soft, furry fur.
translations: 我朋友的宠物是一只可爱的猫咪。
这只猫发出“ 喵喵”的叫声，它的毛是毛茸茸的。

sentences: I have a friendly dog as mypet.
The dog barks happily and is very loyal.
translations: 我的宠物狗对人十分友好。
狗开心地汪汪叫 ，它对主人非常忠诚。

sentences: Be careful not to break the egg when you crack it open.
We can cook the egg in different ways,  like frying or boiling.
translations: 当你敲开鸡蛋时，小心别把它打碎了。
鸡蛋有很多不同的烹饪方式，比如煎或者煮。

sentences: The fish swims gracefully in the water.
The fish has shiny scales on its body.
The orange is juicy and sweet.
I love juicy peaches in summer.
translations: 夏天我喜欢多汁的桃子。

sentences: The cat is soft and furry.

translations: 我听到一声响亮的狗叫。

sentences: The chicken is cooking in the oven.
Let's go swim in the pool.
We can divide the students into two groups: one group is boys, the other is
The girl likes to play games, but she also  studies hard.
translations: 我们可以把学生分成两组，男生为一组  ，女生为一组。
这个女孩虽然喜欢玩游戏，但是她学习也很努力。

sentences: She waved her hand to say hello to her friend.
Washing your hands with soap and water is important for good hygiene.
Put your hands up or you're a dead man.
translations: 用肥皂和水洗手是保持良好卫生习惯的重要一步。
把手举起来，不然你就死定了。

sentences: I saw a tiny insect crawling on a leaf.
Ants are the superheroes of the insect world.
translations: 我看到一只小昆虫在叶子上爬行。
蚂蚁是昆虫界的超级英雄。

sentences: I like to jump. And I jump very high.
translations: 我喜欢跳高 ，而且能跳得很高。

sentences: A father and his son go to a kite-flying festival.
When it's windy, I fly a kite.
translations: 父子俩一起参加了风筝节。

sentences: I run fast with my legs during a  race.
There’s a spider crawling up your leg.
translations: 在比赛中我用腿跑得很快。
有只蜘蛛正顺着你的腿往上爬。

sentences: I have five fingers on each hand.
He made a gesture with his hand.
translations: 点头是一种常见的手势。

sentences: It's too windy to fly a kite.
The Monkey King is not just any normal monkey.
The monkey is hopping on the trees.
translations: 美猴王可不是任何一只普通的猴子。
猴子在树上跳来跳去的。

sentences: How many oranges do you want?
This little pig is digging a big hole.
Look! A big and fat pig.
translations: 这只小猪在挖一个大洞。

sentences: Be quiet, I have something to say.
Let's go  swimming in the river.
The river is 300 metres in length.
He is digging in the garden.
This singer is singing an English song.
The little bird sings a beautiful  melody in the garden.
translations: 这个歌手正在唱一首英语歌。
小鸟在花园中唱着美妙的旋律。

sentences: The head teacher and teachers care about students
Teachers' Day is a special day for all the teachers.
translations: 丨 studies. 校长和老师们都很关心学生们的学习。
教师节对所有老师来说都是特殊的一天。

sentences: I think it's about to  rain ; you can take an umbrella.
This heat wave is coming out strong, you should put up your umbrella
translations: 我认为马上要下雨了，你应该带上雨伞。
这波热浪来势汹汹，你应该撑起伞来遮挡一下阳光。

sentences: I'll take a vacation next week.
The summer vacation will start tomorrow.
In winter, the bear is going to enter the cave and prepare to sleep.
All the kids love winter holiday.
translations: 在冬天，熊要进入洞穴里开始冬眠了。
所有的小孩都喜欢寒假。

sentences: This fox eats a box of chocolates.
translations: 这只狐狸吃了一整盒巧克力。

sentences: Follow me! If you want to eat a yellow  banana.
translations: 跟着我！如果你想吃到黄色的香蕉。
黄色是我最喜欢的颜色。

sentences: We're  going to the zoo next week.
translations: 我们下星期要去动物园。
一只大熊猫正在吃竹子！

sentences: I like my new school bag.
That fat cat wears a hat.
Please take off  your hat when you are in the house.
translations: 那只肥猫戴着一顶帽子。
在房子里请脱下你的帽子。

sentences: "Good day, Little Red Cap," said he. “
There are many ways to wear a cap.
I'm still very sad about what happened.
Don't be sad, everything will be fine.
translations: 我对所发生的事情仍感到十分难过。
别难过了，一切都会变好的。

sentences: My mother is a little angry with me.
When you are angry, take a deep breath and you'll feel better.
translations: 当你生气的时候，深呼吸，你会感觉好一点。

sentences: My cat is on the bed. It's cute.
I need to make my bed before leaving for school in the morning.
translations: 我的猫在床上。它很可爱。
早上动身去上学前，我需要整理床铺。

sentences: The light changed from red to green.
The color of the apple is red.
The ruler is in the desk.
My book and pencil are on the desk.
translations: 我的书和铅笔在桌子上。

sentences: Peter has a cute dog as a pet.
Let his sister get a pet!
translations: 彼德的宠物是一只可爱的狗狗。

sentences: It’s a chicken and egg situation: I stay up late because I have work, but being tired makes it harder to finish my work.
I have to be up with the chickens tomorrow.
translations: 这是一个“先有鸡还是先有蛋”的困境：我因为有工作熬夜，但疲劳使我更难完成工作。 2. be up with the chickens：起床很早，通常指天亮前起床
我最好的朋友是索菲亚。

sentences: I am sending Grandma an e-card.
I'll send an email to my e-friend.
translations: 我正在给奶奶发电子贺卡。
我将要给我的网友发个电子邮件。

sentences: The letter “s” looks like a snake.
Write a love letter to your spouse, kids, or best friend.
translations: 写一封含有爱意的信，给你的配偶、孩子或最好的朋友吧。
我收到了一张电子贺卡。

sentences: Can you go by ship or train?
We go on a boat trip and see a big ship on the water.
I want to live a life filled with candies and toys.
translations: 我们在一次乘船旅行中，看到了一艘大船。
我想过一种充满了糖果和玩具的生活。

sentences: She played well and became the winner of the game.
She is hoping to win the first prize.
translations: 她表现出色，成为了比赛中的赢家。

sentences: You can pick some apples from the garden.
Will you pickup all your toys?
translations: 你可以从花园里摘些苹果。
把你的玩具都收起来好不好？

sentences: You can sit in the sitting room.
I like to drink the peach juice because it's pink.
My sister likes pink roses very much.
translations: 我喜欢喝桃子汁因为它是粉红色的。
我姐姐非常喜欢粉红色的玫瑰。

sentences: There is nothing in the tin.
Green frog jumps in the pond.
A prince turns into a frog in this cartoon fairy tale.
translations: 青蛙在池塘里跳来跳去。
在这部卡通童话片里，一位王子变成了一只青蛙。

sentences: My friend wants to wear green socks.
There is a hole in my sock.
translations: 我的朋友想穿绿色的袜子。

sentences: We can go to the pet shop first.
My mother is shopping for clothes.
His watch is a little faster than my clock.
I set my alarm clock for 4:30.
translations: 他的手表比我的钟快了一点。
玛丽有一个漂亮的娃娃。

sentences: The bookshop is beside the bus stop.
It's already midnight; please stop making noise.
translations: 书店在公共汽车站旁边。
现在是大半夜，不要再吵闹了。

sentences: His body was black and blue.
translations: 他的身上青一块紫一块。

sentences: In the morning, they can have breakfast in the coffee shop.
translations: 早上他们可以在咖啡店吃早餐。

sentences: There are fish in the pond.

translations: 这是一部有趣的动画片。

sentences: We talk about everything under the sun.
translations: 天南地北，我们无所不谈。

sentences: Do you have lunch at school?
translations: 你们在学校吃午饭了吗？

sentences: We have so much fun in Mr. Liu's class.
translations: 在刘老师的课堂上，我们玩很尽兴。

sentences: Where is the nearest subway station?
Do you go to school by bus or by subway?
translations: 你坐公共汽车还是坐地铁去学校？

sentences: We should be careful not to cut ourselves when using scissors.
translations: 约翰逊刮胡子时割伤了自己。
我们使用剪刀时应该小心不要割伤自己。

sentences: Can you play the piano or drum?
People beat drums and gongs to celebrate the arrival of the following year.
translations: 人们在春节敲锣打鼓，庆祝新一年的到来。

sentences: Ducks quack, dogs bark, birds sing, and human speak.
translations: 鸭子嘎嘎叫，小狗汪汪叫，小鸟在唱歌，人类在说话。

sentences: Could I have some fruit sugar for my plum juice?
Is it a grape or  a plum?
translations: 可以给我的梅子汁要加点果糖吗？

sentences: The blue whale is the world's largest living animal.
A whale was found washed up on the shore.
translations: 蓝鲸是现存最大的动物。
一头鲸被发现冲到了岸上。

sentences: There are many trees beside the lake.
We can go fishing in the lake.
Let's meet at the school gate.
translations: 让我们在学校门口碰面。

sentences: A: What's the date? B: It's October 1st.
It was brave of you to do so.
The house is up for sale.
translations: 这件外套正在特价销售。

sentences: The snake looks like an S.

translations: 谢天谢地，今天是星期五！

sentences: Extra ice in my drink, please.
We never learned to ice skate or ski.
translations: 我们从没学过溜冰或滑雪。 I like to eat ice-cream.  我喜欢吃冰淇淋。

sentences: He threw the letter into the fire.
Most animals are afraid of fire.
Jack, let's play hide and seek.
translations: 杰克，我们来玩捉迷藏吧。

sentences: I like going hiking on the weekend.
After a long hike, they went back to their camp, built a fire and cooked dinner.
translations: 长途跋涉后，他们回到营地，生火做饭。

sentences: His smile is warm and friendly.
They have two children aged six and nine.
translations: 他们有两个小孩，一个六岁，一个九岁。 first second third fourth fifth sixth seventh eighth ninth tenth

sentences: What would the boy like to do?
We hope to arrive around two.
He’s hoping to go to college next year.
translations: 我们希望能在两点钟左右到达。

sentences: Shao Guohua never left his hometown.
Here is a letter to his friend in his hometown.
translations: 邵国华从未离开过家乡。
这是一封给他家乡朋友的信。
我种了那些苹果树。 小 课 堂 ：
那是一棵树（远处）。 2.放在一起的两样东西，先说this，后说that。
那是一支铅笔。 3.向别人介绍某人时说This is … ，不说That is … 。

sentences: She is very close to her father.
translations: 她和父亲的关系很亲密。

sentences: His nose is thin and sharp.
Which animal has a long nose?
translations: 什么动物鼻子长？ 唱一唱 ：
我有两只眼睛。So I can see. 所以我能看见。
我有十根手指。They can touch. 它们能摸。
我有两只耳朵。So I can hear. 所以我能听到。
我有一条舌头, inside my mouth, 在我的嘴巴里面, to taste the food I eat.能尝到我吃的东西。

sentences: The phone  rang   and Rose answered it.
They chatted casually on the phone.
translations: 电话响起来了，罗斯接了。

sentences: He sent her a single red rose.
She bent to pick a red rose.
translations: 她弯下腰摘了一朵红玫瑰。

sentences: I don't like being alone at home.
translations: 独自一个人锻炼可能会很无聊。

我不喜欢独自在家。 lone alone lonely 词汇 发音 释义 adj.  孤独的，单独的 adj.  单独的 ；独自的 ； adv.  单独地 ；独自地 adj.孤独的，寂寞的，偏僻的 用法 lone的侧重点是指孤独，单独。 例如：He is a lone traveler. 他是一个独自旅行的人。 alone的侧重点是单独 ，独自。 例如 ：I prefer to be alone. 我喜欢独自一个人。 lonely 的 侧 重 点 是 指 孤独 ，寂寞。 例如 ：She felt lonely in the big city.  她在大城市里感到孤独。

sentences: I have a lot of homework.
It's rude to speak when you're eating.
Jack, don't be rude to your mother.
translations: 吃饭的时候说话不礼貌。
杰克，不能对你妈妈没有礼貌。

sentences: A mule is the child of a donkey and a horse.
They travel on foot and by mule.
translations: 他们靠走路或骑骡子走路。

sentences: I like to eat watermelons in June.
translations: 我喜欢在六月份吃西瓜。
她到六月份就满 21 岁了。 月份单词 ：
一月 February 二月March 三月
四月May 五月June 六月
小狗是非常可爱的动物。

sentences: How manyfaces does a cube have?
Put an ice cube in each glass.
translations: 每一个玻璃杯内放入一冰块。

sentences: I go out today and buy a tube of toothpaste.
translations: 我今天出去买了一管牙膏。

sentences: We must play the game by rule.
translations: 我们必须按照规则进行比赛。

sentences: The boy was born a deaf-mute.
It was nice and warm yesterday.

translations: 今天星期几？B:It’s Friday.今天星期五。

sentences: I drew a picture of my family with my crayon in art class.
translations: 在美术课上，我用蜡笔画了一幅全家福。

sentences: Look at the rabbit, it has a short tail.
The pink pig has a curly tail.
translations: 看那只兔子 ，它的尾巴很短。
这只粉红猪有一条卷卷的尾巴。

sentences: This classroom needs some fresh air, please open the window and door.
I felt a current of cool air.
translations: 请打开门窗，这间教室需要新鲜空气。

sentences: You don't need to wait for me.
It's the yellow light, please wait!
Nancy begins to climb the stairs.
She jumped down off the chair.
translations: 多好的一把椅子呀 ！ 分 一 分 ： chair指可移动的“椅子” ，如与饭桌配套的椅子。 seat指电影院、火车、巴士上固定的“座位”。
绿色是我最喜欢的颜色。

sentences: Would you like tea or coffee?
Most British people drink tea every day but they prefer black tea.
translations: 大多数英国人每天都喝茶，但他们更喜欢红茶。

sentences: Tom and Lily build a sand castle on the beach.
It's two miles to the beach.
translations: 汤姆和莉莉在沙滩上堆沙堡。

sentences: What's the hurry? The train doesn't leave for an hour.
He left the book here for the child to read.
translations: 慌什么？火车还有一个小时才开呢。
他把这本书留在这儿让那个孩子读的。

sentences: The sun rises in the east.
We have to brush our teeth every day.

translations: 我脚痛。 英语复数知识点 ： 在英语里，有许多名词变成复数的规则，让我们一起揭开其中的奥秘吧！ 首先，让我们来看看普通的名词。当我们想表达不止一个东西时，只需要在名词后面加上一个"s"，就变成复数啦！ 比如，"cat"（猫）变成了"cats"（ 一堆猫），"dog"（狗）变成了"dogs"（ 一些狗）。 不过，还有一些名词可不那么乖巧哦！

sentences: A glass of milk and a piece of bread, please.
Would you like some steamed bread?
translations: 请来一杯牛奶和一片面包。

sentences: I had two peanut butter and jelly sandwiches.
translations: 我吃了两个花生酱果酱三明治。

sentences: Urgh! There's a dead fly in my coffee!
He felt half dead with tiredness.
translations: 呸 ！我的咖啡里有只死苍蝇 ！

sentences: The plane is ready for take-off.
translations: 大家都准备好了吗？开演 ！

sentences: She is the best player on her team.
I am good at team work.
She is still weak after her illness.
The team's weak points are in defence.
There is a high mountain in the nature park.
translations: 自然公园里有一座高山。

sentences: All right, class! Turn to page 20.
There is a house on my right.
She's a very sweet old lady.
I think you owe me an apology, young lady!
Nice to meet you, Miss Wang.
Mrs. Liu invites us to her dinner party.
translations: 她是一位非常亲切的老太太。
小姐，我认为你应该向我道歉！
很高兴认识你，王小姐。 2. Ms. ：是指婚姻状况不明的女子，翻译为女士。
张女士是我的老师。 3. Mrs. ：是指已婚女性，翻译为夫人、太太。
刘夫人邀请我们去她的晚宴。

sentences: Try not to get your shoes wet.
Try on clothing and shoes to make sure they fit.
translations: 衣服和鞋要试穿以确保它们合适。

sentences: It 's not easy to quit smoking.
translations: 我是个很容易相处的人。

sentences: Come on now. You know you must be hungry.
I’m so hungry, I think I can finish this dish within few seconds.
translations: 好了。你看你一定是饿了。
我实在太饿了，我能在几秒内吃完这盘菜。

sentences: Our classroom is clean and tidy.
What do you usually do in the evening ?
I usually have coffee in the morning.
The sun always rises in the east.
I often go for a run in the evening.
translations: 你晚上通常干什么？ 分 一 分 : usually ，always和often都有表示“常常，总是”的意思，我们一起来辨别他们：
我通常在早上喝咖啡。 2. 总是（always） ：表示某事无论何时都发生，没有例外。表示一种恒定或永恒的情况。
太阳总是从东方升起。 3. 经常（often） ：表示某事发生频繁，但不一定总是。这暗示一种定期或重复的情况，但允许一些变化。
我经常在晚上去跑步。 总的来说， usually表示普遍的发生，always表示不变和持续发生，而often则暗示频繁但不一定是持续的。

sentences: The baby is three months old.
She had a baby last year.
Try not to get your shoes dirty.
I'm tired of cleaning your dirty laundry.
translations: 我已经受够了洗你的脏衣服。

sentences: I don't want to go out today, because it's cloudy and wet.
translations: 今天我不想出门，因为天阴沉沉的又潮湿。

sentences: Whenever  Daniel's  little  sister was asked to  do something, she always had a
translations: 每次让丹尼尔的小妹妹做点事情，她总是有调皮的回应。

sentences: Have you seen my keys, honey?
translations: 你见到我的钥匙了吗，宝贝？

sentences: They wanted to win so badly.
One should never risk his health or personal safety.
translations: 食品安全是非常重要的。
一个人绝不应该拿健康或个人安全来冒险。

sentences: All the furniture was made of wood.
Their dishes were made of wood.
The desk is made of wood.
translations: 这里所有的家具都是用木料制作的。
他们的盘子是用木头制成的。

sentences: I wanna buy a guide book of Beijing.
He should have let his instinct guide him.
translations: 我想买一本北京的导游手册。
他本该让直觉指导他的行动。

sentences: Would you prefer rice or noodles?
We often have noodles for breakfast.
translations: 你喜欢吃米饭还是面条？

sentences: My foot won't go into this boot.
translations: 我的脚穿不进这只靴子。

sentences: You will love our ice cream and fresh fruit juice.
They eat mainly fruit and nuts.
translations: 你会喜欢我们的冰淇淋和鲜榨果汁的。
他们主要吃水果和坚果。

sentences: Does the hotel have a pool?
She trained five times a week at her local swimming pool.
translations: 这家旅馆有没有游泳池 ？
她每星期在当地的游泳池训练五次。

sentences: Guess what I didfor the whole of the first week.
Guess who I met at the grocery store.
translations: 猜猜整个第一周我都做了些什么。
猜猜看我在杂货店遇到谁了。

sentences: Do you use glue and markers in art class?
translations: 你在美术课使用胶棒和马克笔吗 ？

sentences: Kangaroos live in Australia. They jump on their back legs. The mother kangaroo has a special bag for her baby. Kangaroos eat grass and leaves. They drink water. You can also see kangaroos in zoos in China.
translations: 袋鼠生活在澳大利亚 ，他们用后腿跳跃。袋鼠妈妈有一个特别的袋子装它的小宝宝。袋鼠吃草和叶子 ，喝水。你也可以在中国的动物园里见到袋鼠。

sentences: Goodbye! It was great to meet you.
It's time to say goodbye to my old life.
translations: 是时候告别我过去的生活了。

sentences: See how you feel and try to keep cool.
We dived into the river to cool off.
translations: 你需要更加关注自己的感受，尽量保持冷静。
我们一头跳进河里，凉快一下。
她工作起来太不辞劳苦了

sentences: Could you lend me your notebook?
Please write down the correct answer on your notebook.
translations: 你能把你的笔记借给我吗 ？
请把正确答案写在笔记本上。

sentences: This wool comes from goats, not sheep.
translations: 这种羊毛是山羊毛 ，不是绵羊毛。

sentences: Look! The moon is especially full tonight.
Wish you a happy Moon Festival!
translations: 看！今晚的月亮特别的圆。
祝你有一个愉快的中秋节！

sentences: She's not wearing the red hood.
Robin Hood is a mythical hero.
translations: 她没戴着她的红色兜帽。
罗宾汉是传说中的英雄。

sentences: There once was a poor farmer who had four sons.
translations: 从前有一个贫苦的农夫 ，他有四个儿子。

sentences: She tied her scarf over her head.

translations: 我最喜欢的科目是美术。

sentences: The carrot is his favorite vegetable.
Every time I got good grades, Mom would give me some treats, and when I did something wrong, Mom would punish me. I think that’s carrot and stick.
translations: 胡萝卜是他最喜欢的蔬菜。
每当我取得好成绩时，妈妈都会奖励我，而每当我做错事时，妈妈也会惩罚我。 我想这就是软硬兼施吧。

sentences: There was once a man in South America who had a parrot, a pet bird that can imitate human speech.
translations: 从前 ，南美洲有个人养了一只鹦鹉 ，一种能模仿人类说话的宠物鸟。

sentences: The restaurant is not far from here.
The village is far away from the city.
Don’t forget to come to my birthday party on Sunday.
The party is on Friday evening.
translations: 别忘了周日来参加我的生日聚会。
聚会定于周五晚上举行。

sentences: There's a garden at the front of the house.
I like to read a book in the garden on a sunny day.
translations: 房子的前面有一座花园。
我喜欢在阳光明媚的日子里在花园里读书。
这件 T 恤衫多少钱？

sentences: What you said hurt my feelings.
Be careful not to get hurt while playing sports.
translations: 你的话伤害了我的感情。
在进行运动时要小心不要受伤。

sentences: I'd like to order a hamburger and an orange juice.
translations: 我想点一个汉堡包和一杯橙汁。

sentences: She had spent 29 years as a nurse.
How many skirts do you have?
I need a top to go with this skirt.
translations: 我需要一件上衣来配这条裙子。

sentences: It’s a tradition in America to eat turkey on Thanksgiving Day.
Will you stuff the turkey and shove it in the oven for me?
translations: 感恩节时吃火鸡是美国的传统。
你能帮我把填料塞进火鸡里，然后把它放进烤箱吗？

sentences: He hardly stays up late, and he is an early bird.
She dances like a bird, so graceful and light.
translations: 他很少熬夜，而且是个早起的人。
她跳舞像鸟一样，轻盈而优雅。

sentences: Good morning, sir. Can I help you?
Mr. Smith is our new neighbor.
translations: 早上好 ，先生。您要点什么 ？
史密斯先生是我们的新邻居。 2. sir是一种更加正式和庄重的称呼， 常用于商业场合、服务行业、军队等正式环境，表示对对方的尊敬。在某些文化中，sir也可以用于表示尊重陌生男性，还可能表示对权威或高级官员的尊称。
我能为您效劳吗，先生？ 注意： Mr.之后可接姓或姓名，如我们可以说Mr. Green或Mr. Jim Green，但不说Sir Green或Sir Jim Green.

sentences: He was wearing a T-shirt and shorts.
He wears a pair of shorts.
Please look at the notice board every day.
How often does your school hold a sports meet?
translations: 你最喜欢哪一项体育运动 ？
你们学校多久举行一次运动会？

sentences: It sounds a great idea. Go for it!
Air pollution calls for our special concern.
translations: 这听起来是个极好的主意。努力去实现吧！
空气污染问题需要我们的特别关注。

sentences: Can I borrow a pen from you?
translations: 我可以借用你的钢笔吗 ？
把你的报纸借我看行吗 ？

sentences: We went for a hike in the forest park and enjoyed the beautiful scenery.
One tree does not make a forest.
translations: 我们去森林公园远足 ，欣赏了美丽的风景。

sentences: She was on her first foreign holiday without her parents.
Learning a foreign language can broaden your horizons.
translations: 她第一次在没有父母陪伴的情况下自己去国外度假。
学习一门外语可以拓宽你的视野。

sentences: You have to cut it up and eat it with a fork.
Do you know how to use forks and knives?
translations: 你必须把它切成小块，然后用叉子吃。

sentences: Ruth, I've got this terrible cold and I have to see a doctor.
translations: 露丝，我得了重感冒，得去看医生。

sentences: She puts a new film in her camera.
Are you prepared to tell your story on camera?
translations: 她在相机里装上新胶卷。
你愿意在电视上讲述你的经历吗？

sentences: On the teacher's desk there's an eraser.
translations: 在老师的桌上有一块橡皮擦。

sentences: I played games on the computer and searched for information on the Internet.
My son spends hours playing computer games every day.
translations: 我在电脑上玩游戏，在互联网上搜索信息
我儿子每天花几个小时玩电脑游戏。

sentences: Your forehead is burning. Have you got a fever?
translations: 你的前额很烫。你发烧了吗 ？

sentences: This could be the answer to all our problems.
translations: 这可能就是我们全部问题的解决办法。

sentences: The fruit is small and round.
That dress is too small for you.
translations: 那件连衣裙对你来说太小了。

sentences: When you need help you can call  police at 110.
translations: 需要帮助时，可拨打 110 报警。

sentences: It is fixed on the wall.
I went to the Great Wall with some Chinese friends.
translations: 我和一些中国朋友去了长城。

sentences: I'm not going to fall, am I?
I usually fall asleep within minutes of getting into bed.
translations: 我通常在上床几分钟内就入睡了。

sentences: Let's sit down and have a talk.
He doesn't like to talk about his private life.
translations: 让我们坐下来好好谈谈。
他不愿谈及他的私生活。

sentences: Smoking is not allowed in the hall.
Let's meet at the dining hall for lunch.
translations: 我们在餐厅吃午饭见面吧。

sentences: There‘s a good sports shop in the shopping mall.
translations: 在购物中心有一家很不错的体育商店。

sentences: She decided to walk to the park instead of taking a bus.
translations: 她决定步行去公园，而不是坐公交车。

sentences: I ordered a plate of spaghetti at the restaurant.
translations: 我在餐厅点了一盘意大利面。

sentences: He had to show the white flag at the end of the debate.
The national flag was raised at the opening ceremony of the Olympic Games （奥运会）.
translations: 辩论到最后他只好认输。
国旗在奥运会开幕式上升起。

sentences: All plants need light and water.
translations: 一切植物都需要阳光和水。
灌木）in full sun. 把这些灌木栽在阳光充足的地方。

sentences: Can I have your attention please?
Please, sir, can I open a window?
translations: 老师 ，请允许我打开一扇窗户好吗 ？

sentences: She bent down to pick up her glove.
He put on his baseball glove and headed to the field.
translations: 他戴上棒球手套 ，走向球场。

sentences: I found a toy car on the floor of my son's room.
On the first floor, there is a living room, a dining room, a kitchen, and a laundry.
translations: 我在儿子房间的地板上找到了一辆玩具车。
一楼有客厅、餐厅、厨房和洗衣房。

sentences: This would be a good place for a picnic.
The wedding will take place in a beautiful garden.
translations: 这可是个野餐的好地方。
婚礼将在一个美丽的花园里举行。

sentences: All horses are animals, but not all animals are horses.
translations: 所有的马都是动物，但并不是所有的动物都是马。

sentences: Did you get your mother a present?
At present, I am studying for my exams.
translations: 目前 ，我正在为考试而学习。

sentences: The green grass in the park looks so refreshing.
You're not supposed to walk on the grass.
translations: 公园里的绿草看起来非常清新。

sentences: Lily draws a picture of her pet.
The children love to draw and colour.
translations: 莉莉为她的宠物画了一张画。
儿童喜欢画画和涂颜色。

sentences: If you can not cry for help or run away, give the criminal your money to save your own life.
translations: 如果你不能呼救或逃跑，把你的钱给罪犯，以挽救自己的生命。
喂，你不必喊。 cry指的是因害怕、不愉快、哀求等而大声哭喊或喊叫。 shout多指因激动、生气、高兴，为引起注意而大声喊叫。 cry侧重情感性表达，而shout更多是动作性地传达声音。

sentences: Take a deep breath and see how long you can stay underwater.
The beauty of the scenery will take your breath away.
translations: 深吸一口气，看你能在水里待多久。
美丽的景色将使你大为惊叹。

sentences: Put the meat in the fridge so it doesn't go bad.
There's nothing much in the fridge.
translations: 把肉放进冰箱里 ，免得坏了。

sentences: The Fox and the Grapes is an interesting story.  《
translations: 狐狸和葡萄》是个有趣的故事。

sentences: She'll fight like a tiger to protect her children.
A helmet will help protect you from a head injury.
translations: 她为了保护孩子，可以凶得像只老虎。
头盔可以保护你的头部免受伤害。

sentences: Could you please pass me a pair of chopsticks?
translations: 请给我递一双筷子好吗？

sentences: I need to sweep the floor before guests arrive.
Chinese people would sweep out their houses before the Spring Festival.
translations: 客人到来之前我需要扫地。
在春节前，中国人会打扫干净房屋。

sentences: Kids are playing on the swings.
His arms swung as he walked.
Here is a sticker for you.
She feeds the baby with a spoon.
She used a tea spoon to stir her tea.
Tom spentfive hours on this math problem.
I spend too much time watching television.
translations: 汤姆花了五小时解数学题。
我看电视花的时间太多。

sentences: The new computer cost me a fortune.
I will pay the bill for dinner tonight.
She spent the weekend shopping for clothes.
It takes a lot of time to learn a new language.
translations: 这台新电脑花费了我一大笔钱。
我会支付今晚的晚餐账单。 3. spend（花费） ：强调在一段时间内使用时间、精力、金钱。
她周末花费在购买衣服上。 4. take（花费时间） ：主要用于表示花费时间，而非金钱，例如完成任务或活动所需的时间。
学习一门新语言需要花费很多时间。 简而言之，cost关注总体花费， pay强调支付行为，spend突出在时间内的支出，而take通常用于描述花费时间。

sentences: I can teach you swimming and send you a swimsuit.
The swimsuit costs more than five hundred dollars.
translations: 我可以教你游泳，还可以送你一件泳衣。
这种泳衣价值五百美元。

sentences: When do you usually start doing your homework?
Every sentence should start with a capital letter.
translations: 你通常什么时候开始做作业？
每一个句子都必须以一个大写字母开始。

sentences: The girls were skipping in the playground.
In summer, many kids will go to the playground in that park.
translations: 夏天的时候 ，很多小孩子都会去那个公园里的游乐场。

sentences: She is a single parent, raising her two children on her own.
Parents are the most important people in a child's world.
translations: 她是一个单亲妈妈，独自抚养着两个孩子。
父母在儿童的世界里是最重要的人。

sentences: I'm not strong enough to carry him.
He's strong enough to lift a car!
translations: 他力气大得能抬起一辆汽车 ！

sentences: Around the house there are many fruit trees and many flowers.
translations: 房子周围有许多果树和花朵。

sentences: This is a book for young and old.
I don't have a bank account.
I must go to the bank and get some money.
Eggplant is a kind of vegetable.
Playing throw and catch can improve hand-eye coordination.
I need to throw away these old magazines.
translations: 玩投掷和接球可以提高手眼协调能力。
我需要把这些旧杂志扔掉。

sentences: The feather floated lightly in the air.
The chick will soon feather out.
translations: 这只小鸡很快就要长羽毛了。

sentences: I would rather go for a walk than watch TV.
I would rather stay at home and read rather than go to the party.
translations: 我宁愿去散步也不愿看电视。
我宁愿待在家里读书而不是去参加派对。

sentences: We plan to gather together this weekend.
Can you all gather round ? I've got something to tell you.
translations: 我们计划这周末聚一聚。
你们都围过来好吗？我有事要告诉你们。

sentences: I haven't decided whether or not I will attend the meeting.
We're debating whether or not to go skiing this winter.
translations: 我还没有决定是否参加会议。
我们讨论着今年冬天是否去滑雪。

sentences: I like him, though he makes me angry sometimes.
Though she was tiny, she had a very loud voice.
translations: 我喜欢他，尽管他有时惹我生气。
虽然她个头很小，嗓门却很大。

sentences: Now and then, I like to take a day off and just relax.
I haven't seen her since then.
translations: 偶尔，我喜欢休息一天，放松一下。
自那时以来我就没见过她。

sentences: Please remember to empty the rubbish bin regularly.
The streets were littered with rubbish.
translations: 请记得定期清空垃圾箱。

sentences: She's going to watch a fashion show tomorrow evening.
translations: 这些夹克都是流行款式吗 ？
她明晚打算去看时装表演。

sentences: Every day is a fresh start.
It is said that the world would run out of fresh water in 2050.
translations: 每一天都是一个新的开始。
据说到 2050 年世界上的淡水将会耗尽。

sentences: Could you please bring me a dish of ice cream?
The kids offered to do the dishes.
translations: 你能给我拿一碗冰淇淋吗？
孩子们主动要求洗盘子。

sentences: I need to buy a new book shelf to organize my growing collection of books.
translations: 我需要买一个新的书架来整理我越来越多的书籍。

sentences: He never seemed to need a shave.
Charles decided to shave off his beard.
I love to cook and share with friends.
translations: 我喜欢做饭并与朋友分享。

sentences: She was too shy to ask for help.
translations: 她太腼腆，不愿向人求助。

sentences: The plane is on the runway.
Q: What class are you in?

translations: 你喜欢什么颜色？ 注意:  当有很多可能的选择或者不知道有多少选择时，用what ；当已经知道是两个中的一个或是几个中的一个时，用which。

sentences: Why don’t you go to school?
The wheel is pulling to the left.
Have you got any cheese I can have with this bread?
Everybody, look at here and say cheese.
translations: 你有没有奶酪 ，我好就着面包一起吃 ？
所有的人看着这里说“茄子”。

sentences: I prefer eating chips rather than hamburgers.
All main courses are served with chips or baked potato.
translations: 相比汉堡包，我更喜欢吃薯片。
所有的主菜都配有炸土豆条或烤土豆。

sentences: He is one of the richest people in the world.
The rich man donated a large sum of money to the charity.
translations: 他是世界上最富有的人之一。
这位富豪向慈善机构捐赠了一大笔钱。

sentences: He caught the ball with one hand.
I need to run faster to catch up with my friend.
translations: 我需要跑得更快才能追上我的朋友。

sentences: Do you watch TV every evening?
They watch all the live matches.
translations: 你每天晚上都看电视吗？
他们观看所有现场直播的比赛。

sentences: He was watching a football match.
Jo and Ian are a perfect match for each other.
translations: 他正在看一场足球比赛
乔和伊恩真是天造地设的一对。

sentences: He went to fetch some books.
Could you fetch me my bag?
translations: 你能帮我去取我的包吗 ？

sentences: The kitchen door is at the side of the house.
I can smell something burning  in the  kitchen.
translations: 厨房门开在房子的侧面。
我闻到厨房里有东西烧焦了。

sentences: The balcony has a nice view.
I want to take a photo of this beautiful scenery.
translations: 我想拍下这美丽的风景。

sentences: The dolphin is an intelligent animal.
A dolphin leaps out of the water.
The elephant has a very long trunk.
The elephant is the largest living land animal.
translations: 大象是现今陆地上最大的动物。

sentences: Smiling really can improve your physical health.
After two yearsı physical training, he was stronger and healthier.
translations: 微笑确实可以改善你的身体健康。
经过两年的体能训练，他变得更强壮、更健康了。

sentences: | wasnıt too keen on physics and chemistry.
translations: 我对物理和化学并不太热衷。
物理是我最喜欢的科目。

sentences: He gave a tap at the microphone before speaking.
My hand shook so much that | could hardly hold the microphone.
translations: 他在讲话前先轻叩了一下扩音器
我的手抖得如此厉害 ，几乎都拿不住麦克风了。

sentences: A tusk is made of ivory.
I need to buy a return ticket for my trip to London.
I need to go to the ticket office to buy a train ticket.
translations: 我需要为去伦敦的旅行购买一张返程车票。
我需要去售票处买一张火车票。

sentences: He stuck his gloves in his pocket.
Where did I put the keys? Oh, yes—in my pocket!
translations: 他把手套塞进了口袋里。
我把钥匙放在哪儿了？哦，对了—在我口袋里！

sentences: Can you stick this on the noticeboard?
She gets around with the help of a stick.
translations: 你能不能把这个贴到布告牌上 ？

sentences: Check your work before handing it in.
I need to check out of the hotel before noon.
translations: 交作业以前先检查一遍。
我需要在中午之前结账离开酒店。

sentences: The kids were quick to learn.
translations: 那些孩子学东西很快。 分 一 分 ：quick 与 fast
你不应该把车开得这么快。 fast和quick均可表示“快的” 。fast强调速度很快，quick强调发生时间短，匆忙。fast还可用作副词，quick的副词形式为quickly。

sentences: The truck driver was waiting to unload.
Sacks were being loaded onto the truck.
translations: 人们正在把麻袋装上卡车。

sentences: The key doesn't fit the lock.
We need to lock in the contract before the deadline.
translations: 这把钥匙打不开这把锁。
在截止日期之前，我们需要锁定合同。

sentences: Please close the window, it's getting cold.
On sunny days, you can enjoy the sunshine through the window.
translations: 请关上窗户，天气变冷了。
在阳光明媚的日子里，你可以透过窗户沐浴阳光。

sentences: Give me your hand while we cross the road.
It would be better to transport the goods by rail rather than by road.
translations: 过马路时请拉着我的手。
用铁路运送这批货物会比用公路好。

sentences: These days kids grow up so quickly.
Life is a journey, we are born, we grow, we live, we work, we grow old and we die.
translations: 如今孩子们成长得真快。
生命是一场旅程 ，我们出生 ，成长 ，生活 ，工作 ，变老 ，然后死去。

sentences: I don't know how this happened.
Do you know Peter? He's hilarious.
translations: 我不知道这事怎么发生的。
你认识皮特吗？他风趣得很。

sentences: I see there are some goats over the hill.
The most common meats are goat, chicken, beef and pork.
translations: 我看到山坡上有几只山羊。
最常见的肉类是羊肉、鸡肉、牛肉和猪肉。

sentences: “I have faith in these guys,” the coach said. “These are good  players.”
Our facility provides intensive coaching, training facilities and nutritional advice.
translations: “我相信这些人，”教练说道。“这些都是好球员。”
我们的设施提供强化训练、培训设备和营养建议。

sentences: She put on her coat and went out.
She came in and took her coat off.
Smoking is not allowed in this building.
translations: 在这栋楼里不允许吸烟。

sentences: It cost somewhere around two thousand dollars.
translations: 买下来要花大约两千元。

sentences: He wore a black suit and a bow tie to the wedding.
After the concert, the band members came out to take a bow.
translations: 他穿着黑色西装和蝴蝶结领带去参加婚礼。
音乐会结束后，乐队成员出来向观众鞠躬致意。

sentences: In the sentence “I spoke to the driver of the car”, “the driver of the car” is a noun phrase.
In French, the adjective must agree with the noun in number and gender.
translations: 在句子“I spoke to the driver of the car”中，“the driver of the car”是名词短语。
法语中形容词必须在数和性上与名词一致。

sentences: They cost two dollars a pound.
I didn't put that pound under your pillow.
translations: 我没有把那一英镑放在你的枕头下。

sentences: I think I want to get this red blouse.
translations: 这条裙子和我的上衣挺配的。
我觉得我想买这件红衬衫。

sentences: Dad went out to milk the cows.
The machine is worked by wind power.
Real power belongs to the few.
translations: 这台机器是以风力推动的。
真正的权力掌握在少数人手中。

sentences: You don't sound like a foreigner talking English.
Liza was so frightened she couldn't make a sound.
translations: 你听起来不像外国人在说英语。
莉莎惊吓得发不出任何声音。

sentences: The finger of the clock points to twelve.
He pointed at the map to show me the location.
translations: 他用手指地图指示地点给我看。

sentences: "If you want to go to the toilet, please raise your hands." the teacher said.
translations: 老师说：“想要上厕所的小朋友，一定要举手告诉老师哦！”

sentences: I work hard because I  enjoy doing my job.
The purpose of living is to pursue happiness and  enjoy  oneself.
I enjoy reading books in the evening.
I love spending time with my family.
translations: 我努力工作，因为我喜欢我的工作。
人生的目的是追求幸福、享受人生。
我喜欢这首歌 2. enjoy（享受） ：意味着从某种活动或经验中获得乐趣或满足感。它比like更强烈， 暗示一种积极的、令人愉快的体验。
我很享受在夜晚读书。 3. love（爱） ：表示最强烈的喜好，是一种深情或强烈的感情。使用love时，通常表示对某物或某人有强烈的情感连接。
我喜欢和家人共度时光。 总的来说， like是一种较轻的喜好，enjoy表示对某事感到愉快，而love则表达了更深的感情和热爱。

sentences: It is the world's biggest producer of oil and gas.
That is an oil painting of a landscape in spring.
translations: 这是世界上最大的石油、天然气生产国。
那是一幅刻画春天风景的油画。

sentences: How many people does the company employ?
He is an employee of Fuji Bank.
translations: 这个公司雇用了多少人 ？
他是富士银行的一位雇员。

sentences: Everyone is welcome to join in the conversation.
The chorus was singing The Ode to Joy.
translations: 合唱团那时正在唱着《欢乐颂》。

sentences: I often go running before work.
Everything is just like before, nothing has changed.
translations: 一切都和以前一样 ，没有什么变化

sentences: The main course was roast duck.
It’s cold outside; please close the door when you leave.
He made a living of sorts selling encyclopedias door-to-door.
translations: 外面很冷，请您离开时记得关门。
他靠挨家挨户推销百科全书勉强谋生。

sentences: Lemon is a kind of sour fruit.
Walking three miles in the pouring rain is not my idea of fun.
Now pour the tea into the cups.
translations: 顶着倾盆大雨走三英里路，我可不认为是好玩的事。

sentences: I am more than happy to help you, but I'd appreciate being asked politely.
More and more people are using the Internet.
translations: 我非常乐意帮助你 ，但我希望你礼貌地请求。
越来越多人在使用互联网。

sentences: He puts his key under the doormat.
translations: 他将钥匙藏在门前擦鞋垫下。

sentences: Shopping is a real chore for me.
When children finish a chore, they will not only take pride in a job well done but also have confidence in their ability to do things well.
translations: 对我来说 ，购物真是件苦差事。
当孩子们完成一件家务时 ，他们不仅会为自己做得好而感到自豪 ，而且会对自己的能力有信心。

sentences: A bus appeared around the corner.
Your name will appear at the front of the book.
translations: 你的名字将出现在书的前页。

sentences: Cheer up, you still have time to try it again.
translations: 你应该使自己振作起来。
振作起来，你还有时间再试一次。

sentences: There are 4 seasons in a year.
The park is open all year round.
The movie was so touching that many people were in tears.
These now are the walls we must tear down.
translations: 这部电影太感人了，很多人都流泪了。
这些墙我们现在必须推倒。

sentences: Schools need volunteers to help children to read.
Volunteer work gives her life (a sense of) purpose.
translations: 学校需要志愿者来帮助孩子们阅读
做志愿工作使她的生活有了意义。

sentences: Can you drop me near the bank?
Is there a gents near here?
translations: 你可以让我在银行附近下车吗？

sentences: After losing his job, he had to find a new way to earn a living.
translations: 失业后，他不得不寻找新的谋生方式。

sentences: Dear Li Ming, I am happy to have a new pen friend.
Would you like a drink, dear?
translations: 亲爱的李明 ，我很开心能结交一位新笔友。
我最喜欢的季节是春天。
